response.original_title: Un viaje por el sur del Perú y parte de Bolivia (primera y segunda partes)
response.overview: The first full-length national film. The first two films of the series are shown, comprising: Mollendo, passenger embarkation and disembarkation; Sea's fury, panoramic view; Trains departing for Arequipa; In the middle of the sandy area; Different parts of the line; Tingo: the baths, the promenade, the lagoon; Arequipa: panoramic view; Mercaderes Street, the Misti volcano, the Plaza de Armas, the Cathedral, the Station, the observatory located at the foot of the Misti volcano, departure from Arequipa, the railway, Yura, old and modern transport, the Quiscos zigzag.
response.title: Un viaje por el sur del Perú y parte de Bolivia (primera y segunda partes)
